name: HYPERTROPHIC OSTEOARTHROPATHY
definition: HYPERTROPHIC PULMONARY OSTEOARTHROPATHY (HPO) = MARIE- paraneoplastic syndrome
discriminating_features: lamellar periosteal proliferation of new bone, at first smooth then undulating + rough
"parallel track" / "double stripe" / "tramline" sign = patchy linear diffusely increased

general: lamellar periosteal proliferation of new bone, at first smooth then undulating + rough
"parallel track" / "double stripe" / "tramline" sign = patchy linear diffusely increased

clinical.Prognosis: treatment of underlying condition leads to remission of symptoms often within 24
